_comment: Generated by kitsoki persona-qa deck from tools/persona_qa/examples/runs/kitsoki-product-review (persona-qa-kitsoki-product-review). Re-run the command instead of hand-editing derived scenes.

scenes.narration: This deck was generated deterministically from an existing Persona QA run bundle and its recorded media manifest.
scenes.subtitle: Kitsoki - Software architect - persona-qa-kitsoki-product-review
scenes.title: Kitsoki Persona QA Example

scenes.caption: Software architect

cards.label: Surface
lines: Open the product surface first, then inspect the generated artifacts.

cards.label: First question
lines: Can I explain the delivery loop to another architect without rerunning the system?

cards.label: Evidence
lines: Recorded UI playback, scenario outcomes, review gates, and reproducible commands.

cards.label: Risk focus
lines: A claim without playback or a workflow step that cannot be traced to source artifacts.

cards.label: Finding bias
lines: Prefer findings that improve reviewability and presentation readiness.

scenes.narration: The deck keeps the persona lens visible so reviewers judge the scenario evidence from the intended point of view.
scenes.title: Persona lens

scenes.caption: Rows are sorted by scenario id for deterministic output.
scenes.narration: The scenario table ties each natural-use task to its outcome, evidence coverage, and playback count.
scenes.title: Recorded scenarios

scenes.caption: Bundle readiness, evidence coverage, and the highest-signal checks.

items.detail: Kitsoki can produce a presentation-ready journey deck when scenarios, review gates, and recorded playback are kept together.
items.label: ready

items.detail: The generated deck explains the workflow in reviewable chunks.
items.label: architect-readiness

items.detail: Each scenario has a playback-capable media manifest item.
items.label: playback-evidence

items.detail: Repeated persona-qa deck generation is byte-stable.
items.label: regeneration

scenes.narration: The review scene summarizes bundle readiness without rerunning capture or model work.
scenes.title: Review gate

scenes.caption:
explain-delivery-loop: validated
verify-ui-evidence: validated
scenes.narration: Findings are grouped by type so a technical reviewer can separate strengths from product risks.
scenes.title: Persona judgement

scenes.caption:
Playback items: 2
Videos: 2
Images: 0
Scenarios: explain-delivery-loop, verify-ui-evidence

scenes.title: Playback manifest

scenes.caption: Harness choices and journal events behind the playback evidence.

scenes.caption: Generated decks are derived from run artifacts; change the source bundle or generator, then regenerate.

scenes.narration: The deck is a derived artifact. The durable source is the run bundle plus the recorded media manifest.
scenes.title: Regenerate from source artifacts
